name: Magna Steyr Graz
summary: Magna Steyr's Graz operation is one of Europe's key contract-vehicle manufacturing and engineering hubs, with mixed drivetrain production on one site.

name: Audi Ingolstadt
summary: Audi's Ingolstadt headquarters combines vehicle production, battery assembly, and plant transformation work for the group's electrified future.

name: Volkswagen Wolfsburg Plant
summary: The Wolfsburg plant is the heart of the Volkswagen brand and one of the world's largest single-site automobile manufacturing complexes.

name: BASF Schwarzheide CAM Plant
summary: BASF's Schwarzheide site is a major European battery-materials node and Germany's key cathode active materials production asset.

name: BASF Ludwigshafen Verbund Site
summary: Ludwigshafen is BASF's headquarters and the world's largest integrated chemical complex, making it one of Europe's highest-value industrial sites.

name: WACKER Burghausen
summary: Burghausen is WACKER's key production site and a major Bavarian chemicals cluster for silicones and specialty intermediates.

name: Olympic Dam
summary: Olympic Dam combines mining, smelting, and refining and is one of BHP's core copper assets in South Australia.

name: Chuquicamata
summary: Chuquicamata is one of Codelco's core copper operations and one of the world's defining copper mining districts.

name: Collahuasi Mine
summary: Collahuasi is one of Chile's largest copper mines and a major Andean source of concentrate exports.

name: El Teniente
summary: El Teniente is a flagship Codelco copper division and one of the world's major underground copper mining systems.

name: Escondida Mine
summary: Escondida is BHP's flagship Chilean copper complex and one of the world's largest copper mining operations.

name: Spence Mine
summary: Spence is a major BHP copper operation in northern Chile and part of the company's Pampa Norte platform.

name: Kamoa-Kakula
summary: Kamoa-Kakula is one of the world's most important new high-grade copper mining complexes and a growing African copper supply hub.

name: Grasberg Minerals District
summary: Grasberg is one of the world's most important copper-gold mining districts and a major Asian copper supply node.

name: Cerro Verde
summary: Cerro Verde is one of Peru's flagship large-scale copper operations and a key Pacific-side copper export source.

name: Nutrien Redwater
summary: Redwater is one of Nutrien's major nitrogen production sites and a strategic ammonia and fertilizer node in western Canada.

name: Yara Belle Plaine
summary: Belle Plaine is Yara's large nitrogen site in Saskatchewan and a major ammonia and urea production node in North America.

name: OCP Jorf Lasfar Fertilizer Hub
summary: Jorf Lasfar is OCP's main fertilizer transformation platform and one of the world's largest phosphate fertilizer hubs.

name: OCI Nitrogen Geleen
summary: Geleen is OCI Nitrogen's core European ammonia and nitrates production base and an important continental fertilizer node.

name: Yara Sluiskil
summary: Sluiskil is one of Yara's core European ammonia and fertilizer production sites and an important Northwest European nitrogen hub.

name: Dangote Fertiliser Plant
summary: Large fertilizer complex in the Lagos Free Trade Zone next to the Dangote refinery area.

name: Indorama Eleme Fertilizer Complex
summary: Eleme is one of the region's large urea and ammonia production sites, with expanded capacity backed by Line 2 financing.

name: Yara Heroya
summary: Heroya is Yara's flagship Norwegian fertilizers and ammonia site and a strategic European nitrogen node.

name: OMIFCO Fertilizer Complex
summary: World-scale two-train ammonia and granular urea manufacturing complex on Oman's east coast.

name: Maaden Ras Al Khair Fertilizer Complex
summary: Ras Al Khair is Maaden's main eastern phosphate processing and fertilizer export hub on the Gulf coast.

name: Fertiglobe Ruwais
summary: Ruwais hosts Fertiglobe's large ammonia and urea production footprint and is a strategic Gulf fertilizer export hub.

name: CF Donaldsonville Complex
summary: Donaldsonville is CF Industries' flagship nitrogen complex and one of the world's largest integrated ammonia and urea sites.

name: OCI Iowa Fertilizer
summary: OCI Iowa Fertilizer is a large U.S. nitrogen complex built around ammonia, urea, and UAN production.

name: Pearl GTL
summary: Pearl GTL is one of the world's largest gas-to-liquids complexes and a strategic gas-processing asset at Ras Laffan.

name: Hawiyah Gas Plant
summary: Hawiyah is one of Aramco's major gas-processing hubs and central to Saudi Arabia's expanding gas system.

name: Tanajib Gas Plant
summary: Tanajib commenced operations as one of Aramco's largest gas plants and anchors the company's current gas growth push.

name: Uthmaniyah Gas Plant
summary: Uthmaniyah is one of the world's largest gas processing plants and a core Saudi natural-gas processing node.

name: Habshan Gas Processing Complex
summary: Habshan is one of the UAE's major gas-processing complexes and a core node in ADNOC's onshore gas network.

name: Ras Laffan Helium Complex
summary: Ras Laffan is Qatar's main gas-processing industrial city and anchors the country's strategic helium production footprint.

name: Amur Gas Processing Plant
summary: Amur GPP is one of the world's largest gas-processing sites and Gazprom's flagship helium production project.

name: Orenburg Helium Plant
summary: Gazprom identifies the Orenburg helium plant as one of the two enterprises underpinning Russia's large-scale helium production chain.

name: Federal Helium Reserve / Cliffside
summary: The BLM-managed Federal Helium Reserve near Amarillo remains one of the key strategic helium nodes in the United States.

name: LaBarge Gas Plant
summary: LaBarge is one of the United States' strategic helium-processing nodes, separating helium from a complex Wyoming gas stream.

name: Christmas Creek Mine
summary: Christmas Creek is a major Fortescue Pilbara mine and part of the company's integrated iron ore rail and port chain.

name: Cloudbreak Mine
summary: Cloudbreak is one of Fortescue's foundational Pilbara iron ore mines and a long-running contributor to export supply.

name: Eliwana
summary: Eliwana is a newer Fortescue Pilbara mine and rail hub that materially adds to the group's export capacity.

name: Gudai-Darri
summary: Gudai-Darri is Rio Tinto's newest large Pilbara iron ore mine and part of its core export chain.

name: Jimblebar Mine
summary: Jimblebar is one of BHP's major Pilbara iron ore mines and part of the integrated WAIO export system.

name: Mount Whaleback
summary: Mount Whaleback is one of the emblematic Pilbara iron ore mines and a core asset in BHP's export system.

name: Solomon Hub
summary: Solomon is one of Fortescue's core Pilbara mining hubs and a major feeder into the company's export system.

name: South Flank
summary: South Flank is BHP's newest large Pilbara iron ore mine and a major source of premium iron ore feedstock.

name: Yandicoogina Mine
summary: Yandicoogina is one of Rio Tinto's major Pilbara iron ore mines and an established feeder into its export system.

name: Minas-Rio
location_label: Conceicao do Mato Dentro, Minas Gerais
summary: Minas-Rio is Anglo American's flagship Brazilian iron ore system linking mine, slurry pipeline, and export terminal.

name: S11D
summary: S11D is Vale's flagship Serra Sul operation and one of the world's largest newer iron ore projects.

name: Serra Norte - Carajás
summary: Vale's Serra Norte complex at Carajás includes some of the world's highest-grade large-scale iron ore production.

name: Gorgon LNG
summary: Gorgon is one of Australia's largest LNG projects and a strategic export node in the Asia-Pacific gas trade.

name: North West Shelf LNG
summary: North West Shelf is one of Australia's foundational LNG export complexes and remains a major regional gas export node.

name: Pluto LNG
summary: Pluto LNG is one of Woodside's core Australian LNG export assets and part of the broader Karratha gas export cluster.

name: Wheatstone Project
summary: Wheatstone is a major LNG export project in Western Australia with linked offshore gas supply and export trains.

name: PETRONAS LNG Complex
summary: The PETRONAS LNG Complex in Bintulu is one of the world's largest LNG production facilities on a single site.

name: Ras Laffan LNG Complex
summary: Ras Laffan is Qatar's main LNG industrial city and one of the most strategically important liquefaction concentrations in the world.

name: Cameron LNG
summary: Cameron LNG is a strategically important U.S. Gulf Coast LNG export terminal on the Calcasieu Ship Channel.

name: Corpus Christi Liquefaction
summary: Corpus Christi is Cheniere's major Texas LNG platform and one of the core U.S. liquefaction export sites.

name: Freeport LNG
summary: Freeport LNG is one of the main U.S. Gulf Coast liquefaction export terminals serving Atlantic and Pacific basin demand.

name: Sabine Pass LNG
summary: Sabine Pass is one of the foundational U.S. LNG export terminals and a major Gulf Coast liquefaction node.

name: Abqaiq Plants
summary: Abqaiq is Aramco's flagship oil processing and crude stabilization complex and one of the world's most important upstream oil nodes.

name: OMV Schwechat Refinery
summary: Schwechat is OMV's flagship Austrian refining and fuels complex and remains a core energy-security and petrochemicals node near Vienna.

name: Jamnagar Refining Complex
summary: Reliance describes Jamnagar as the world's largest integrated single-location refining complex and a major refining hub for petroleum products.

name: Paradip Refinery
summary: Paradip is Indian Oil's large coastal refinery and a strategically important refined-products node on the Bay of Bengal.

name: Shell Pernis Refinery
summary: Shell Pernis is one of Europe's largest integrated refinery and chemicals manufacturing sites, making it a key refined-products node.

name: SATORP Refinery
summary: SATORP is a large export-oriented full-conversion refinery in Jubail and a key Gulf refined-products asset.

name: Yanbu Refinery
summary: Yanbu Refinery is a major Red Sea refining asset in Aramco's downstream portfolio and a strategically important refined-products site.

name: Ruwais Refinery
summary: Ruwais is ADNOC's core refining and industrial hub and one of the Gulf's major refined-products production nodes.

name: Lonza Visp
summary: Visp is Lonza's largest and oldest site, combining pharma process development with large-scale biopharma and small-molecule manufacturing.

name: Novartis Stein
summary: Novartis describes Stein as a strategically important Swiss production site for innovative medicines, including sterile forms and cell and gene therapies.

name: Roche Basel/Kaiseraugst
summary: Roche identifies Kaiseraugst as one of its most important production and packaging locations within the Basel life-sciences cluster.

name: Infineon Villach
summary: Infineon's Villach campus anchors Austria's semiconductor footprint with wafer fabrication, advanced packaging, and logistics expansion next to its new chip factory.

name: GLOBALFOUNDRIES Fab 1 Dresden
summary: GLOBALFOUNDRIES' Fab 1 in Dresden is one of Europe's core foundry assets and a critical node in Germany's semiconductor manufacturing base.

name: Infineon Smart Power Fab Dresden
summary: Infineon's Smart Power Fab extends Dresden's role as a semiconductor cluster with large-scale investment in power and industrial chip manufacturing.

name: voestalpine Linz Steelworks
summary: voestalpine operates a fully integrated metallurgical site in Linz, making it one of Austria's defining heavy-industry assets.

name: Salzgitter Flachstahl
summary: Salzgitter Flachstahl is one of Germany's core flat-steel sites, with major investment in high- and ultra-high-strength coated sheet capacity.
